projectDescription: Zero-authentication executive reporting dashboard for project health visibility

milestones.description: Initial project planning and team alignment

milestones.description: System design and component architecture finalization

milestones.description: Comprehensive testing and quality assurance pass

milestones.description: Optimize rendering performance and load times

shippedThisMonth.title: Dashboard Layout Component
shippedThisMonth.description: Main dashboard grid layout with responsive design

shippedThisMonth.description: Horizontal timeline component with status indicators

shippedThisMonth.description: KPI cards for completion percentage and health status

shippedThisMonth.title: Print-Optimized CSS
shippedThisMonth.description: Screenshot and print media query styling

shippedThisMonth.title: Data Loading Service
shippedThisMonth.description: JSON file loading and caching service

schema.projectName: string - Display name of the project
schema.lastUpdated: ISO 8601 timestamp - When data was last updated

metrics.healthStatus: enum [OnTrack, AtRisk, Blocked] - Project health indicator
metrics.velocityThisMonth: integer - Work items completed this month
metrics.atRiskItems: integer - Count of items at risk
